panels.description: Number of completed shifts since run started

targets.query:
from(bucket: "manufacturing")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "opcua")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.run_id =~ /^${run_id}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "ShiftTotal_Completed")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])
  |> last()

panels.title: Shifts Completed

targets.query:
from(bucket: "manufacturing")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "opcua")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.run_id =~ /^${run_id}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "Shift_Number")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])
  |> last()

panels.description: Seconds remaining in the current shift

targets.query:
from(bucket: "manufacturing")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "opcua")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.run_id =~ /^${run_id}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "Shift_Remaining")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])
  |> last()

panels.title: Shift Time Remaining

panels.description: Parts produced in the current shift

targets.query:
from(bucket: "manufacturing")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "opcua")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.run_id =~ /^${run_id}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "CurrShift_Parts")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])
  |> last()

panels.title: Current Shift Parts

panels.description: Overall Equipment Effectiveness for the current shift

targets.query:
from(bucket: "manufacturing")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "opcua")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.run_id =~ /^${run_id}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "CurrShift_OEE")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])
  |> toFloat()
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value > 0.0)
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * 100.0}))

panels.title: Current Shift OEE

panels.description: Defect rate in the current shift

targets.query:
from(bucket: "manufacturing")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "opcua")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.run_id =~ /^${run_id}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "CurrShift_DefRate")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])
  |> toFloat()
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * 100.0}))

panels.title: Current Shift Defect Rate

panels.description: Availability / Performance / Quality / OEE breakdown for current and previous shift

targets.query:
from(bucket: "manufacturing")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "opcua")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.run_id =~ /^${run_id}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "CurrShift_Avail" or r._field == "CurrShift_Perf" or r._field == "CurrShift_Qual" or r._field == "CurrShift_OEE")
  |> toFloat()
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value > 0.0)
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * 100.0}))
  |> keep(columns: ["_field", "_value"])

panels.title: Current Shift: A / P / Q / OEE

panels.description: OEE / Parts / Defect Rate for the most recently completed shift

targets.query:
from(bucket: "manufacturing")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "opcua")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.run_id =~ /^${run_id}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "PrevShift_OEE" or r._field == "PrevShift_DefRate")
  |> toFloat()
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * 100.0}))
  |> keep(columns: ["_field", "_value"])

panels.title: Previous Shift: OEE / Defect Rate

targets.query:
from(bucket: "manufacturing")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "opcua")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.run_id =~ /^${run_id}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "PrevShift_Parts" or r._field == "PrevShift_GoodParts")
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["_field", "_value"])

from(bucket: "manufacturing")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "opcua")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.run_id =~ /^${run_id}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "CurrShift_GoodParts" or r._field == "CurrShift_DefParts")
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["_field", "_value"])

panels.description: Parts produced in the current shift — resets to zero at each shift change

targets.query:
from(bucket: "manufacturing")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "opcua")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.run_id =~ /^${run_id}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "CurrShift_Parts")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: Current Shift Parts Over Time

targets.query:
from(bucket: "manufacturing")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "opcua")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.run_id =~ /^${run_id}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "Throughput")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)

panels.description: OEE of each completed shift — shown as a step chart; each step is one completed shift

targets.query:
from(bucket: "manufacturing")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "opcua")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.run_id =~ /^${run_id}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "PrevShift_OEE")
  |> toFloat()
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value > 0.0)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * 100.0}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: OEE per Completed Shift

panels.description: Parts produced per completed shift — each step is one completed shift

targets.query:
from(bucket: "manufacturing")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "opcua")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.run_id =~ /^${run_id}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "PrevShift_Parts")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value > 0)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: Parts per Completed Shift

panels.description: Shift change events — shows completed shift stats extracted from event log

targets.query:
from(bucket: "manufacturing")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sim_events")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.run_id =~ /^${run_id}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.event_type == "SHIFT_CHANGE")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "message" or r._field == "extra_json")
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "message", "extra_json"])
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)

panels.title: Shift Change Log
